goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'ely' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 17:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to ely and should leave on wednesday
The train should arrive by 17:15 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get price and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the south
Make sure you get attraction type
